creator: Helbig@MX.BA-Stuttgart.De
text:
Since the last "make world" the cursor keys in the info browser
	won't work like before.

Fix: 

Regress to a somewhat older version of info.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Enter
		info gcc
	on the commandline and press cursor down key to move the cursor
	down. It won't move the cursors as expected.
